title: How can you write a lookup formula from one board to another?
excerpt: Hi, I use tools in excel to write look up formulas for one sheet in an excel workbook to another page in the same workbook. Can I do the same in Monday? If so, does anyone have any examples on how to do that?   Thank you…

posts.author: Kimbersh (Kimberly)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I use tools in excel to write look up formulas for one sheet in an excel workbook to another page in the same workbook. Can I do the same in Monday? If so, does anyone have any examples on how to do that? Thank you, Kim

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Kimbersh

We developed an app called Match Index Column that implements the Excel MATCH/INDEX formulas. It can be found on the marketplace here.
